case_title: JUNIE HENDRICKSON VS. GWENDOLYN DOLIS JOHNSON

docket_entries.description: NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF JUNIE HENDRICKSON OR DEFENDANT GWENDOLYN DOLIS JOHNSON. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE IN THE FILE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
